name: Vision HERO Poisoner
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｖ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴィジョンヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ポイズナー
desc: If you take battle or effect damage while this card is in your GY: You can place this card from your GY in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Trap. During the Main Phase, if this card is treated as a Continuous Trap: You can Tribute 1 "HERO" monster; Special Summon this card. If this card is Special Summoned from the Spell & Trap Zone: You can halve the ATK of 1 face-up monster on the field. You can only use each effect of "Vision HERO Poisoner" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you take battle or effect damage while this card is in your GY: You can place this card from your GY in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Trap. During the Main Phase, if this card is treated as a Continuous Trap: You can Tribute 1 "HERO" monster; Special Summon this card. If this card is Special Summoned from the Spell & Trap Zone: You can halve the ATK of 1 face-up monster on the field. You can only use each effect of "Vision HERO Poisoner" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

jp_sets.set: Collection Pack: Duelist of Revolution Version

action: Activates if you take battle damage
Activates if you take effect damage
Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
